name: Zucchini Fiesta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini and crookneck squash crosswise into 1/4 inch-thick slices.
2. Cut the olives in half crosswise.
3. Cut the avocado into small cubes, removing any pit.
4. Steam the zucchini and crookneck squash over boiling water until crisp-tender (about 3 minutes). Remove from heat and let cool in ice water for a few moments; then drain well.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, oil, salt, cumin, and green onions. Add the cooled squash, olives, cream cheese, diced chilies, and avocado. Stir lightly to combine.
6. Chill the mixture for 30 minutes.
7. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on four salad plates. Spoon equal portions of the salad onto each plate. Garnish with fresh coriander.
Per Serving: 5 grams protein, 10 grams carbohydrate, 24 milligrams cholesterol, 335 calories.
